articles.summary: This briefing examines the recent uptick in Treasury yields, the impact of Nvidia earnings, Fed policy expectations, rising debt, and political developments on market sentiment and valuations.

articles.title: Technology Briefing: Gemini for Science and the AI Landscape
articles.summary: This briefing examines Google’s Gemini for Science platform, the evolving infrastructure and economics of AI, emerging regulatory challenges, and how these dynamics shape product strategy and investor behavior. It also reflects on how AI is redefining human experience through sensory augmentation.

articles.title: AI Infrastructure Needs Operational Trust More Than Bigger Promises
articles.summary: The next useful wave of AI platforms will be judged by reliability, observability, data boundaries, and the ability to recover cleanly when agents make mistakes.
articles.imageAlt: Editorial illustration of AI infrastructure dashboards and control signals

articles.title: Markets Are Pricing Systems, Not Headlines
articles.summary: For long-term readers, the useful question is not whether a headline is dramatic, but whether it changes liquidity, earnings durability, policy expectations, or risk appetite.
articles.imageAlt: Editorial illustration of market signals and capital flows
